name: In-a-Pinch Potato Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup unseasoned dry bread crumbs OR cornmeal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over medium heat, cook potatoes, covered, in 2 inches of boiling water until tender, about 15 minutes. Drain and mash.
2. In a large bowl combine the mashed potatoes, apples, onion, cheese, egg, salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly to blend all ingredients.
3. Form the mixture into 8 patties that are about 3/4 inch thick.
4. Coat the patties with bread crumbs.
5. In a large nonstick skillet over medium heat, melt the butter and oil until they begin to sizzle.
6. Fry the patties for about 5 minutes on each side or until they are browned.
Menu: Red Cabbage and Celery Slaw, Oatmeal Cookies and Canned Apricots
Nutritional Information Per Serving: 400 calories; 17 g fat; 80 mg cholesterol; 880 mg sodium; 49 g carbohydrate; 4 g fiber; 14 g protein.
